title: stelis fornix
intro: Stelis fornix, also known as the "ant orchid," is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Stelis fornix include its use in treating wounds, reducing fever, and easing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis fornix may include infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, often used to create topical treatments or remedies for internal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
